leadText: Icy Wind (Japanese: こごえるかぜ Freezing Wind) is a damage-dealing Ice-type move introduced in Generation II. It is: TM16 in Generation II. TM27 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM034 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM049 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation II 1.2 Generation III onwards 1.3 Generation VIII 1.3.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.4 Generation IX 1.4.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation II [ edit | edit source ] Icy Wind inflicts damage and has a 255/256 (~99.6%) chance of lowering the target's Speed stat by one stage. Generation III onwards [ edit | edit source ] Icy Wind deals damage to all adjacent opponents and lowers the Speed of hit Pokémon by one stage. Icy Wind can be used as part of a Contest Spectacular combination , with the user gaining an extra three appeal points if the move Hail was used in the prior turn. Icy Wind is a wind move . sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad2 An Ice -type attack. It is guaranteed to reduce the target's Speed if it hits. G S C An icy attack that lowers Speed . R S E Colo XD A chilling attack that lowers the foe's Speed . FR LG A chilling wind is used to attack. It also lowers the Speed stat. D P Pt HG SS PBR The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. It also lowers the target's Speed stat. B W B2 W2 The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. It also reduces the targets' Speed stat. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. This also lowers the opposing Pokémon's Speed stats. Sw Sh BD SP S V The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. This also lowers opposing Pokémon's Speed stats. LA The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. ZA The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. This also makes targets move more slowly for a short time.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Inflicts damage on the target, even at a distance. It also lowers the target's Movement Speed by one level. MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target, even at a distance. It also reduces the target's Movement Speed by 1 level. B S L はなれたポケモンに ダメージをあたえる しかも いどうそくどを １だんかいさげる Conq. Blow an icy gale toward the target. May also reduce the target's Range. MD GtI It damages even a faraway Pokémon. It also lowers the Pokémon's Travel Speed. S MD It damages a Pokémon, even one far away. It also lowers the Pokémon's Travel Speed. MD RT DX It damages a Pokémon, even one far away. It also lowers the target's Travel Speed.
